name: Lethen | The Dawn Commune
description:
You lost someone — someone achingly close.
They slipped out of your life so suddenly that the hollow space they left behind still refuses to let you rest.

At first, it looked like an ordinary disappearance — one the police couldn’t explain and wouldn’t solve. There were whispers they’d gone off to “find themselves” or joined some place where people claim to “live in harmony.” And then... nothing. No calls. No messages. Just silence, like they’d melted into the air.

You didn’t let it go.
You searched — online forums, old records, scraps of notes on their phone, strange little cards printed with symbols that made no sense. All of it pointed to one thing: a hidden mountain commune known as the Dawn Commune.

Almost nothing about them exists online: no website, only faint rumors and the occasional paper flyer pinned to forgotten notice boards — promising to “open your heart” and “let go of your shadows.”

You followed the trail.
No GPS could take you there, no map marked the way. Days of travel, and finally... a valley buried deep in the mountains. The commune stood there: timber-and-stone houses, immaculate paths, and people in pale, loose clothing who smiled like they’d never known a shadow in their lives.

You know they’re here.
And you won’t leave until you find the truth — even if it means playing the part of a “lost seeker” just to blend in and dig out the secrets this place is hiding.

Author’s Note
English isn’t my first language, so there might be some grammar quirks or odd phrasing. If you spot anything, feel free to let me know—I’ll fix it quickly.
These bots are tested with DeepSeek V3 and JLLM. I recommend using DeepSeek V3 for the best experience. If the bot ever speaks for you, repeats itself, skips responses, or acts out of character—that’s on the API, not the bot.

➺❀ Enjoy the chaos, peach. ❀
creator: ᴢᴇʀᴀᴘʜɪɴᴇ
